description: IDF continued ground operations in northern Gaza. Civilian movement severely restricted. Aid at critical shortage.
Houthi forces fired two anti-ship ballistic missiles at US Navy destroyer in Red Sea. Missiles intercepted.
Houthi drone boats targeted Greek-flagged vessel in Gulf of Aden. Ship sustained damage, crew evacuated.
Israeli airstrikes on reported Hezbollah weapons storage near Beirut southern suburbs. No casualties reported.
Israeli airstrikes destroyed Iranian weapons convoy near T4 airbase in Homs province.
Iran-backed militia drone and rocket attack on US Erbil base. No casualties. US retaliated against militia positions.
Iran conducted ballistic missile test from Semnan. IAEA expressed concern about trajectory data.
Jordanian air force intercepted Iranian-linked drones crossing airspace. Jordan condemned violation.
Hezbollah fired rockets into northern Israel. Iron Dome intercepted most. Two impacts near Kiryat Shmona.
Houthi seized a vessel in Red Sea claiming links to Israel. Crew of 25 held.
Iran deployed long-range drones for exercise simulating attacks on 'enemy infrastructure'.
UAE enhanced port security. Houthi spokesperson threatened Gulf state ports supporting US operations.
Israeli airstrikes near Damascus targeting Iranian IRGC advisory presence. Reports of casualties.
Major Israeli airstrike campaign in Khan Younis. Infrastructure damage extensive.
IDF struck Hezbollah anti-tank missile unit near border. Retaliatory rockets fired at Israeli towns.
Drone attack on US al-Asad airbase. Iran-backed militia claimed responsibility.
Houthi drone intercepted near Saudi oil terminal in eastern province.
US airstrikes against Houthi missile storage and launch sites in Sanaa and Hodeidah provinces.
Iran tested hypersonic missile prototype. State media claimed it could penetrate all air defenses.
IAF strikes on Gaza and simultaneous limited strikes in Yemen targeting Houthi radar systems.
Ballistic missile fired toward Jordan from Yemen. Intercepted by Jordanian and US forces.
IDF ground forces conducted limited incursion into southern Lebanon targeting tunnel network.
